name: Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair
description_short: Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 4.6/5 with 119 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair is a credit repair provider serving clients in Miami, Florida. With 119 Google reviews and a 4.6/5.0 rating, Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a financial consultant, Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Miami, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Miami, Florida area who are considering Resolutions Made Easy Credit Repair should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
